title: The War Within: Hashimoto's, Graves', and the Gut That May Be Starting the Fight
description: Autoimmune thyroid disease is the most common autoimmune condition in the world — and the origin story is being rewritten. The protagonist is not where most people expected to find it. It is in the gut.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The War Within: Hashimoto's, Graves', and the Gut That May Be Starting the Fight
